infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CareNest uses your location for caregiver check-in and check-out timestamps.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CareNest uses your camera to capture live proof photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: CareNest sends service activity and shift notifications.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CareNest needs your location to share with your careseeker during service.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CareNest needs your location to share with your careseeker during service.
